assignments.name: Date_Value_Update_For_Stage_Change
assignments.label: Date Value Update For Stage Change

assignments.description: Unchecking the “Try Before Buy” Checkbox should clear previously entered Trial Check In/Out dates, rechecking the checkbox should not retains old dates instead it should be reset.
assignments.name: Make_Trial_Info_Null
assignments.label: Make Trial Info Null

assignments.name: Update_Waitlist_Status_Update_Value_to_Null
assignments.label: Update Waitlist Status Update Value to Null

customErrorMessages.errorMessage: Generate Agreement to be done prior closing
Please update Minimum DMF years value before closing the Opportunity
Please ensure {!$Record.Minimum_DMF_Years_Number__c} DMF Rate Schedule record available in the related list to Proceed

decisions.name: Check_Condition_to_add_Prefix_to_Name
decisions.label: Check Condition to add Prefix to Name

decisions.name: Check_DocumentLink_present_in_Agreement_names
decisions.label: Check DocumentLink present in Agreement names

rules.name: Service_Request_is_Other_Than_RL_or_AH
rules.label: Service Request is Other Than RL or AH

decisions.name: Check_if_agreement_is_generated_or_not
decisions.label: Check if agreement is generated or not

decisions.name: Check_if_Opp_Status_is_Not_AW
decisions.label: Check if Opp Status is Not AW

decisions.name: Check_If_Opportunity_Waitlist_Status_is_Changed
decisions.label: Check If Opportunity Waitlist Status is Changed to AW

decisions.name: Check_if_service_Provider_is_null_or_not
decisions.label: Check if service Provider is null or not

decisions.description: This decision element checks if the location is neither Ballan nor the Pines
decisions.name: Check_Location
decisions.label: Check Location

decisions.name: Check_mecwacare_account_present_or_not
decisions.label: Check mecwacare account present or not

decisions.description: This element checks if the rental checkbox is checked or not
decisions.name: Check_Rental
decisions.label: Check Rental

decisions.description: This decision element checks if the location and accommodation field has values or not
decisions.name: Conditional_Requirements
decisions.label: Conditional Requirements

decisions.name: if_DMF_Minimum_Year_Not_null
decisions.label: if DMF Minimum Year Not null

decisions.name: if_min_DMF_Rate_Total_not_null
decisions.label: if min DMF Rate Total not null

decisions.description: This decision element checks if the location is changed and it not empty
decisions.name: Location_changed
decisions.label: Location changed?

decisions.description: checking funding type is NDIS and NDIS number on Account
decisions.name: NDIS_Checklist
decisions.label: NDIS Checklist

decisions.description: This Decision element checks if the Try Before Buy checked or not
decisions.name: Try_Before_Buy_check
decisions.label: Try Before Buy check

Flow.description: Trigger Before Save actions on Opportunity

formulas.name: NamingConventionOpp
formulas.expression:
IF( CONTAINS({!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName}, "Retirement_Living"), {!$Record.Account.FirstName} & " " & {!$Record.Account.LastName} & " - RL" & IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Accommodation__r.Unit_Number__c})), " - " & {!$Record.Accommodation__r.Unit_Number__c}, "" ) & IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Location__r.Name})), " - " & {!$Record.Location__r.Name}, "" ),
IF( CONTAINS({!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName}, "Affordable_Housing"), {!$Record.Account.FirstName} & " " & {!$Record.Account.LastName} & " - AH" & IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Accommodation__r.Unit_Number__c})), " - " & {!$Record.Accommodation__r.Unit_Number__c}, "" ) & IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Location__r.Name})), " - " & {!$Record.Location__r.Name}, "" ),
IF( CONTAINS({!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName}, "Buy_Back"), "Buy Back - " & {!$Record.Accommodation__r.Unit_Number__c} & " - " & {!$Record.Location__r.Name}, IF( AND(CONTAINS({!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName}, "Home_Care"), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT({!$Record.Funding_Type__c}))) ), {!$Record.Account.FirstName} & " " & {!$Record.Account.LastName}& " - " & TEXT({!$Record.Funding_Type__c}), IF( CONTAINS({!$Record.RecordType.DeveloperName}, "Home_Care"), IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Service_Request__c}, "Support at Home"), "SAH - " & {!$Record.Account.FirstName} & " " & {!$Record.Account.LastName}, IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Service_Request__c}, "Social Support Groups"), "SSG - " & {!$Record.Account.FirstName} & " " & {!$Record.Account.LastName}, IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Service_Request__c}, "NDIS"), "NDIS - " & {!$Record.Account.FirstName} & " " & {!$Record.Account.LastName}, IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Service_Request__c}, "Allied Health"), "AH - " & {!$Record.Account.FirstName} & " " & {!$Record.Account.LastName}, IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Service_Request__c}, "Home Care"), "HC - " & {!$Record.Account.FirstName} & " " & {!$Record.Account.LastName}, IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Service_Request__c}, "Nursing"), "NS - " & {!$Record.Account.FirstName} & " " & {!$Record.Account.LastName}, IF( ISPICKVAL({!$Record.Service_Request__c}, "Other"), "OS - " & {!$Record.Account.FirstName} & " " & {!$Record.Account.LastName}, {!$Record.Account.FirstName} & " " & {!$Record.Account.LastName} ) ) ) ) ) ) ),
"" )))))

Flow.label: MC_OpportunityBeforeSaveFieldUpdates

recordLookups.name: Copy_2_of_Get_DMF_Rate_Schedules
recordLookups.label: Copy 2 of Get DMF Rate Schedules

recordLookups.description: To get the custom metadata records
recordLookups.name: Get_Custom_metadata_records
recordLookups.label: Get Custom metadata records

recordLookups.description: To check if there are any files attached to the Opportunity
recordLookups.name: Get_the_Records_from_Content_Document_link
recordLookups.label: Get the Records from Content Document Link
